listOfQuestions.question: Which Cell Biology concept is described by this clue: The organelle that stores most genetic material in eukaryotic cells?
Which Cell Biology concept is described by this clue: An organelle that releases usable energy from food molecules?
Which Cell Biology concept is described by this clue: A structure that builds proteins from amino acids?
Which Cell Biology concept is described by this clue: A membrane network involved in protein and lipid processing?
Which Cell Biology concept is described by this clue: An organelle that modifies and packages cell products?
Which Cell Biology concept is described by this clue: An organelle that breaks down waste and worn cell parts?
Which Cell Biology concept is described by this clue: A plant cell organelle that carries out photosynthesis?
Which Cell Biology concept is described by this clue: A rigid outer layer that supports some kinds of cells?
Which Cell Biology concept is described by this clue: A storage compartment inside a cell?
Which Cell Biology concept is described by this clue: A specialized structure inside a cell?
Which Cell Biology concept is described by this clue: Movement of particles from higher concentration to lower concentration?
Which Cell Biology concept is described by this clue: Diffusion of water across a selectively permeable membrane?
Which Cell Biology concept is described by this clue: Movement across a membrane using cellular energy?
Which Cell Biology concept is described by this clue: A protein that speeds up a chemical reaction?
Which Cell Biology concept is described by this clue: A molecule used as a direct energy source in cells?
Which Cell Biology concept is described by this clue: Cell division that produces genetically identical body cells?
Which Cell Biology concept is described by this clue: Cell division that produces gametes with reduced chromosome sets?
Which Cell Biology concept is described by this clue: Maintaining a stable internal condition?
Which Cell Biology concept is described by this clue: A boundary that controls movement into and out of the cell?
Which Cell Biology concept is described by this clue: The gel-like material inside a cell where many reactions occur?
